title: Concept 1-Pager
summary: Fill-in form that renders a Norton-branded concept card and exports it as JPEG or standalone HTML for participant handoff.

title: Concept Builder — Beta Tool
summary: Structured form that generates production-ready Claude prompts for landing pages or iOS prototypes.

title: Concept Builder — Capabilities
summary: Multi-select Norton capabilities (including NeoClaw and Norton Genie) with role selectors to show how each feature appears.

title: Concept Builder — Jobs To Be Done
summary: Priority-ordered JTBD rows that enforce the When/I want/So I can format and feed directly into the Claude prompt.

title: Concept Builder — Voice & Tone
summary: Six curated voice profiles (Quiet Guardian, Trusted Advisor, etc.) to keep copy consistent without prompt engineering.

title: Where is Norton — SKU Lineup
summary: Breakdown of CSP 1–6 plans, pricing, unit mix, and why CSP3 (Deluxe/Premium) is the sprint's primary target.

title: Where is Norton — Competitive Context
summary: Brand health rankings and the four competitive lanes Norton must answer: Big Tech, specialists, challengers, embedded.

title: Competitive Analysis — Overview
summary: Beta dashboard of competitor fit scores, threat lanes, feature matrix, and Norton’s unfair advantages.

title: Competitive Analysis — Feature Matrix
summary: Side-by-side comparison of capabilities (identity, AI scam detection, parental controls) across Norton, McAfee, NordVPN, Aura, etc.

title: Resources — Research & Insights
summary: Centralized research decks, JTBD studies, and supporting artifacts for sprint participants.

title: Laura Persona
summary: Full persona sheet for Laura the Outsourcer — motivations, anxieties, behaviors, and design principles.
